description: Simulate a specific stakeholder's reaction to findings — their priorities, objections, and what would persuade them
usage: how would a CFO react, what would investors think, stakeholder perspective, simulate someone's response, how would X respond to this

target.description: Which upstream findings to react to (matches research/compare/evaluate filenames)

role.description: The stakeholder perspective: CFO, end-user, regulator, skeptical-CTO, junior-developer, investor, competitor, etc.

tone.description: Output style: analytical (third-person assessment), voice (first-person as the persona), brief (bullet-point reactions only)
